_meta.notes: Book I, Chapter 4 — Whose Song Carries. Branch I resolves at the end of this chapter. The factional pressure has built; whichever has the most influence claims the early voice in the year.

title: Whose Song Carries
theme: the question of the month is asked plainly; everyone hears their answer differently
worldEvent: in the Salt Cathedral, the Choristers' long song reaches a verse no one has heard before; it stops mid-phrase
narratorPromptFragment: The current world-chapter is BOOK I, CHAPTER 4: WHOSE SONG CARRIES. The Choristers' long song reached a strange verse last night and then stopped. Three different rumors say three different reasons. The Rust Hand is moving too — quieter, in iron. By the chapter's end Branch I resolves; until then, nothing is decided. Reference all three factions sometimes; favor none.
